assertions.reason: apps/remix/app/components/general/app-nav-desktop.tsx keeps inactive nav links on semantic muted tokens without the removed dark-mode opacity hack.
evidence: Read/Grep: apps/remix/app/components/general/app-nav-desktop.tsx:89 contains `text-muted-foreground` on the nav link class list.

assertions.reason: The document and template recent-activity views use semantic muted text for activity descriptions and timestamps without the removed dark-mode opacity hack.
evidence: Read: apps/remix/app/components/general/document/document-page-view-recent-activity.tsx:149 and :155 use `text-muted-foreground` for the description and timestamp.
Read: apps/remix/app/components/general/template/template-page-view-recent-activity.tsx:117 and :133 use `text-muted-foreground` for the description and timestamp.
Grep: `dark:text-muted-foreground/70` has no matches in either recent-activity file.

assertions.reason: Both signing page v1 chevron controls use `dark:text-foreground`, so the icons are no longer hidden by `dark:text-background` in dark mode.
evidence: Grep: `dark:text-background` has no matches in either signing page v1 file.

assertions.reason: The recent-activity timeline dots and bordered timeline elements use semantic `border-border` and `ring-border` tokens instead of raw gray and neutral border classes.
evidence: Grep: `border-gray-300`, `ring-gray-300`, `dark:border-neutral-600`, and `dark:ring-neutral-600` have no matches in either recent-activity file.
